mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_inventory_balance (item_id, warehouse_id, qty_on_hand, qty_allocated, avg_cost, last_txn_date, version, updated_at) SELECT #{itemId}, #{warehouseId}, COALESCE(SUM(qty_on_hand), 0), COALESCE(SUM(qty_allocated), 0), CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(qty_on_hand), 0) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(qty_on_hand * unit_cost) / SUM(qty_on_hand), 6) ELSE 0 END, #{bizDate}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM t_inventory_lot WHERE item_id = #{itemId} AND warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} AND status IN ('AVAILABLE', 'QUARANTINE') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE qty_on_hand = VALUES(qty_on_hand), qty_allocated = VALUES(qty_allocated), avg_cost = VALUES(avg_cost), last_txn_date = VALUES(last_txn_date), version = version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
